title: Device Management
description: An enterprise device management system for IT teams to monitor health scores, compliance gaps, warranty risks, and asset status.
description_cn: 围绕设备健康、合规和保修风险搭建企业业务系统，帮助 IT 团队持续管理设备状态。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Device Management: a device health dashboard, security & compliance tags, warranty risk, and AI asset-label recognition. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/25-device-management.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 设备管理：设备健康看板、安全合规标签、保修风险和 AI 资产标签识别。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/25-device-management.html
